name: Ocean Power Technologies, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. (OPT, we, our, or the Company) is a Maritime Domain Awareness (MDA) company specializing in innovative intelligent maritime solutions. These solutions include a variety of as a service systems, including Data as a Service (DaaS), Robotics as a Service (RaaS), and Power as a Service (PaaS).
